text.message: I needed to see what would roll before taking jt
you have 4 points and offering bogus trades
Bro you need to take road
Yeah I misclicked when I needed brick
I took an extra wood by accident
Ok we survived. So now blue can give me road
If blue trades me we’re ok
blue, you need to keep army
You trade me, I'll take it
Yeah idk what blue is doing
Take it i dont want blue with road
Yeah blue wants toad for himself
If he doesn’t see the difference between me having road vs him, then he’s delusional
I’ll need help to get road back
Why will i feed you road when I can take it
You were the one crying for me to take road
Takes when I didn't have the opportunity
blues done well to extend it
If I do I'll obviously take kt
